summary: WEBPACK-BUNDLED Homepage Images Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 54 images from /static/media/*.hash.jpg (webpack bundled), ZERO R2 CDN images, ZERO /api/media/r2/ proxy images, ZERO /homepage-banners/ (old static) images, ZERO video elements. Hero poster loads from /static/media/the-painter-of-stars-hero.6d48ef7dcadeafb719b3.jpg with naturalWidth=800. Mobile viewport (390x844) also verified - hero poster loads from webpack bundle. Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefill. Public landing page works (no regression).
critical_code_review_comments: staticBanners.js: 28 JPEG files imported via webpack from ../assets/homepage/ - images become part of JS bundle
Dashboard.js: Uses getStaticHeroImg/getStaticCardImg which return webpack-hashed URLs (/static/media/*.hash.jpg)
ZERO network dependency for homepage visuals - images are literally part of the compiled JS bundle
Ken Burns animation active on hero poster, badge pulse animation on cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webpack-bundled homepage images fully verified. Key findings: 1) ALL homepage images from /static/media/*.hash.jpg (webpack bundled), 2) ZERO R2 CDN images (pub-*.r2.dev), 3) ZERO media proxy images (/api/media/r2/), 4) ZERO old static path images (/homepage-banners/), 5) ZERO video elements, 6) Hero poster: /static/media/the-painter-of-stars-hero.6d48ef7dcadeafb719b3.jpg with naturalWidth=800, 7) Mobile viewport (390x844) verified - hero loads from bundle, 8) Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefill state, 9) Public landing page works (no regression). NOTE: 2 images in Trending Now section are data:image/jpeg;base64 (inline base64) which is also acceptable as it's bundled in JS.

mobile_viewport_hero.details: 390x844 viewport - hero poster loads from webpack bundle
